tables.name: Sea Omens
rows: The gulls go silent all at once
A rope frays with no weight on it
The compass needle drifts, then settles wrong
A wave breaks against the current
Fog rolls in under a clear sky
A bell tolls from somewhere below the waterline

tables.name: Isle Folk
rows: A lighthouse keeper who won't say what the light is for
A castaway who claims to remember a sunken isle
A fisher who only nets things that shouldn't float
A cartographer redrawing a coastline that keeps moving
A diver selling salvage no one asks the source of
A captain who refuses to sail past a certain latitude

sections.title: Setting
lines: The charts disagree with each other more every year.
An isle that was here last season may not be this season.
Storms arrive faster than any ship can outrun.

scene.title: The Chart Doesn't Match
scene.body: Landfall on an isle that isn't on any chart you carry. The crew is already arguing about whether to stay the night.
